allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); const keys = Object.keys\({...p.dependencies,...p.devDependencies}\).filter\(k=>k.includes\('tanstack'\)\); keys.forEach\(k=>console.log\(k, p.dependencies[k]||p.devDependencies[k]\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.get\('dependencies',{}\).items\(\) if 'stripe' in k.lower\(\) or 'tanstack' in k.lower\(\)}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const Stripe = require\('stripe'\); const s = new Stripe\('sk_test_x', { apiVersion: '2026-04-22.dahlia' }\); console.log\('ok'\)")
